name: ghost-doc
description: Ghost Doc — black-box runtime documentation tool. Hub server, CLI, and dashboard.

scripts.copy-dashboard: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const src=path.resolve(process.cwd(),'../dashboard/dist');const dest=path.resolve(process.cwd(),'public');if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.rmSync(dest,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true});const logoSrc=path.resolve(process.cwd(),'../../logo.png');if(fs.existsSync(logoSrc))fs.copyFileSync(logoSrc,path.join(dest,'logo.png'));const idx=path.join(dest,'index.html');if(fs.existsSync(idx)){let h=fs.readFileSync(idx,'utf8');h=h.replace(/<link rel=\"icon\"[^>]*>/,'<link rel=\"icon\" type=\"image/png\" href=\"/logo.png\" />');fs.writeFileSync(idx,h);}console.log('[ghost-doc] dashboard copied to hub/public');}else{console.log('[ghost-doc] dashboard/dist not found — run dashboard build first');}"
